CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-17-2012 Assigned To Arbitration On Jun-25-12

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Ingterrogatories
Off Calendar May-21-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: appearances:
No appearance by plaintiff.

bradley a. russi, deputy city attorney, office of the city attorney, tel. 415.554.3800, for defendant and moving party city and county of san francisco.

PLAINTIFF IS deemed to have stipulated that the motion will be decided by the Pro Tem Judge with the same authority as a Superior Court Judge.

The Pro Tem Judge adopts his tentative ruling: Defendant City and County of San Francisco's unopposed motion to compel is granted. Plaintiff shall respond to the City's discovery requests within fourteen days of the date of this order. Plaintiff shall make herself available for deposition within thirty days of the date of this order. Sanctions against Plaintiff and her attorney are awarded to the City in the amount of $500 and must be submitted to the City within thirty days of the date of this order. see written order.

Judge Pro Tem Bruce Highman, not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Continued To Jun-01-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. Court ordered defendant Galarce Louis dimissed. Court ordered a Case Management Conference scheduled on 6/1/2012 at 2:00 PM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
